items.title: Exodus to cut 25% of global workforce in payments shift
items.summary: This restructuring is part of a strategy to build a full-stack payments platform following the company's acquisitions of Monavate and Baanx.

items.title: Hut 8 surges on $9.8 billion AI data-center lease, lifting compute sector
items.summary: The long-term deal sparked a rebound in AI compute stocks after investors questioned demand for new data center capacity.

items.title: Allbridge Pauses Cross-Chain Protocol After $1.65M Flash Loan Attack
items.summary: An attacker used a flash loan to distort the bridge's Solana stablecoin pools before moving the proceeds to Ethereum, security firms said.

items.title: Peter Brandt predicts the exact day Bitcoin’s bear market will be over
items.summary: Renowned trading analyst Peter Brandt says investing in Bitcoin today, will pay off much better in two to three years than buying AI stocks at current prices.

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: Tom Lee's Bitmine slowed ether purchases as it bought back $86 million in stock
items.summary: The company added just 7,430 ETH, worth about $14 million, last week as it nears its goal to corner 5% of Ethereum's supply.

items.title: Strategy raises $263.5M through MSTR sales, holds 843,775 Bitcoin
items.summary: Strategy boosted its cash reserve to $3.225 billion after selling MSTR shares, while investors weighed the value of its STRC preferred stock.

items.title: Saylor's Strategy raises cash reserves to $3.2 billion, leaving bitcoin holdings unchanged
items.summary: For the second consecutive week, the firm kept bitcoin holdings steady, choosing to use the raised capital to boost cash for paying dividends on its preferred stock.

items.title: Hyperliquid sets 500,000 HYPE stake for permissionless prediction market deployers
items.summary: Hyperliquid plans to require developers to stake 500,000 HYPE, worth about $30.4 million, to deploy permissionless prediction markets under HIP-4.

items.title: Vietnam sets fines for unlicensed crypto trading ahead of regulation rollout
items.summary: The new rules establish penalties as much as $1,900 for crypto violations, including unlicensed trading and AML breaches, ahead of Vietnam’s regulated crypto market launch.

items.title: Zilliqa asks exchanges to pause ZIL transfers after suspected cold wallet theft
items.summary: Zilliqa said exchanges paused ZIL deposits and withdrawals after an exchange partner’s cold wallet was compromised, with the amount stolen still undisclosed.

items.title: Brazil’s securities regulator sets up task force with 60-day deadline for tokenization proposal
items.summary: The framework will address critical issues like official ownership records, private key custody, transaction reversibility and system liability.

items.title: Bank of Korea prepares for live CBDC transactions with 9 banks in September

items.summary: Institutional due diligence is shifting toward continuous monitoring, signer controls and incident readiness after operational failures accounted for most crypto losses.

items.summary: Russia’s State Duma is set to consider the crypto regulation bill in second and third readings, with rules for investors and cross-border payments included.

items.title: Grayscale plans regular cash payouts from ETH, SOL staking rewards
items.summary: Grayscale plans to establish regular cash distributions from staking rewards generated by its Ether and Solana exchange-traded products.

items.title: Crypto market slips even as equities advance. Pump surges on social-media chatter
items.summary: With a Fear and Greed index pointing solidly at "fear," crypto prices drifted lower even as stock index futures rose. PUMP's 20% surge was the only real headline in an otherwise quiet session.

items.title: Trader maintains $67K BTC price target: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week

items.summary: Permissionless prediction markets will become available first on testnet and later on mainnet, Hyperliquid said.

items.title: Bitcoin ETF inflows extend to second week, but recovery lacks momentum
